title: eriophyllum lanatum var. cuneatum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. cuneatum, also known as Bigelow's woolly sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The plant's extracts have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Eriophyllum lanatum var. cuneatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its benefits for overall well-being.
